keywords_required: Add at least one keyword before searching.
tooltip_work_type: Work type detected from the job listing
tooltip_relevance: Relevance score (0–100): how well this job matches your profile
tooltip_fit: CV fit score (0–100): how well your CV matches this job
no_jobs: No jobs found. Run a search first.
placeholder_summary: e.g. I'm a full-stack developer with 5 years of experience in React and Node.js…
tooltip_rank_btn: Search fetches jobs instantly with no AI. Ranking runs an AI pass to score each listing — run it after searching or when you update your profile.
rank_hint: Jobs were fetched without AI scoring. Click Rank by relevance to have the AI score each listing against your profile and keywords.
hint_desired_title: Used as default keyword when searching and in cover letters
hint_location_profile: Your home city or preference, e.g. Stockholm
hint_experience_years: Total years of professional work experience
hint_summary: A short pitch about yourself — used by AI when scoring and generating cover letters
hint_skills: Technologies and competencies you want to highlight, e.g. Python, Scrum
hint_cv_text: Your full CV — the AI analyses it to match you against job listings
hint_keywords: Job titles or technologies to search for, e.g. "Frontend Developer", "React"
hint_max_jobs: Approximate number of listings fetched per search
hint_sources: Job boards that will be searched
hint_tag_input: Press Enter or comma to add
no_jobs_title: No jobs yet — here's how to get started:
workflow_step_1: Fill in your Profile (name, skills, CV)
workflow_step_2: Go to Search and add keywords
workflow_step_3: Click "Start search" to fetch job listings
workflow_step_4: Come back here and click "Rank by relevance" — this runs an AI pass to score each listing against your profile (search itself has no AI)
